response.justification: While the candidate has over 15 years of solid software engineering experience and an entrepreneurial background as a founder, they lack the Director-level strategic leadership and deep, recognized AI/ML expertise required for this Principal AI Strategy role. Their AI experience appears limited to a very recent position, which does not align with the requirement for advising strategic customers and driving enterprise-level AI innovation.
strengths: Over 15 years of diverse software engineering experience
Entrepreneurial background as an open-source platform founder
Demonstrated builder fluency across multiple domains and stacks
concerns: Lacks deep, recognized expertise in AI/ML strategy
Scope of experience is below the required Director-level IC expectations
No evidence of advising strategic enterprise customers on AI adoption
